"'''The Way of the Warrior'''" is a 10 page comic that appears in [[Star Wars Tales 18|''Star Wars Tales'' 18]]. It was written by [[Peter Alilunas]].

==Plot summary==
On the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], a year prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], a lone cloaked figure wanders into a small colony. When the leader of the colonists, [[Larbo]], emerges to see what is happening, the young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] hurls a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] and flees into one of the tents. As chaos ensues, [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] arrives to slaughter the scattered prey. When approached by two gun men, a flick knife appears from his gauntlet and, presumably, slits their throats. He then hunts down the other colonists.

Larbo finds Boba cowering in the corner of his tent and holds him at gunpoint to interrogate him. He is horrified to learn the young boy is the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter's]] son. Jango, having finished assassinating the remaining members of the camp, tracks down Boba and demands that Larbo release his son and slashes his way through the tent's canopy. A disgusted Larbo asks what kind of man would use his own son as bait, and Boba replies that "only a son can know his father's heart." Jango seizes Boba and throws a thermal detonator into the tent before escaping with the boy.

Jango and Boba leave the planet in the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']], and the bounty hunter confirms to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] that his mission was accomplished. The ruling families can now commence with building factories for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Lords' other allies.

On Boba's first training mission, he learns an important lesson — that a warrior must suppress all emotion to succeed.
